title: xylopia carinata
intro: Xylopia carinata, also known as the West African black pepper tree, is a plant species in the family Annonaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xylopia carinata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against various diseases due to its antioxidant properties. Xylopia carinata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in West Africa.
